name: Rajesh Kumar
text: Diksha transformed our operations with Zoho One. The automation she built saved our team hours of manual work every day.

name: Priya Sharma
text: Excellent work on our patient management system. The CRM customization was exactly what we needed. Highly professional.

name: Amit Patel
text: The Zoho Books setup and API integrations were flawless. Our invoicing is now fully automated. Great communication throughout.

name: Sneha Reddy
text: Our lead management improved dramatically after Diksha's CRM implementation. Response time dropped from hours to minutes.
